data.title: First Ascent Biomedical opens FPM Cancer Lab in Miami, accepting patient referrals. Eligible colorectal cancer patients may qualify for sponsored testing.
data.description: A laboratory in Miami is currently open to receiving referrals from patients and physicians. Residents of Florida, as well as colorectal cancer patients across the country, may be eligible for special programs covering the expenses of testing. On February 16, 2026, First Ascent Biomedical revealed the launch of these programs.

data.title: BayCare appoints Robert Carvajal as new CISO to oversee cybersecurity strategy. Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on February 16, 2026, BayCare introduced Robert Carvajal, CISSP, as the new chief information security officer (CISO). Carvajal will lead BayCare's cybersecurity efforts, aiding the health system’s ongoing emphasis on safeguarding information.

data.title: Crypto's CLARITY Act swiftly cleared House in June 2025; Senate facing delays in passing the framework.
data.description: The CLARITY Act passed swiftly through the House of Representatives after its introduction in June 2025, but has encountered setbacks in the Senate, causing delays in its progress.

data.title: 50% of risk prevention executives globally struggle to detect/respond to new fraud trends, says study by Provenir.
data.description: A recent survey sponsored by Provenir, a global AI-powered Decision Intelligence leader, revealed that 50% of credit risk and fraud executives find their most significant challenge in application fraud strategy to be swift detection and response to emerging fraud trends. With fraudsters leveraging new technologies, organizations are under pressure to stay ahead of increasingly sophisticated threats while also maintaining customer trust.

data.title: Homebuyer down payments decreased to $64,000 in December, down 1.5% year over year, first decline in 5 months - Redfin.
data.description: In Seattle, the median down payment for U.S. homebuyers decreased by 1.5% year over year to $64,000 in December, marking the first decline in five months. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage partner of Rocket. Although the median home sale price rose slightly by 0.5% during the same period, down payments decreased in dollar value due to homebuyers putting down a lower percentage of the purchase price compared to the previous year. The average percentage of the purchase price put down by typical homebuyers also declined in December.

data.title: Linkhome in Irvine launches AI Agent to ease home buying & financing. Enhances property search & mortgage processes.
data.description: The city of Irvine in California witnessed the unveiling of Linkhome Holdings Inc. on February 16, 2026. Linkhome, a cutting-edge real estate and financial technology platform, introduced its newest innovation - the Linkhome AI Agent. This intelligent assistant is designed to revolutionize property searches, assess opportunities, and assist in navigating mortgage procedures.

data.title: TTEC launches AI-driven frontline performance ecosystem using RealSkill™ and Perform™ for enterprise growth.
data.description: TTEC is increasing its reach and boosting the corporate implementation of its AI-powered frontline performance ecosystem, which includes TTEC RealSkill™ and TTEC Perform™.

data.title: Transition Industries and CFEnergía sign contract to build world’s largest ultra-low carbon methanol plant in Sinaloa.
data.description: In Mexico City, Mexinol has finalized a gas supply agreement with CFEnergia, marking a significant step towards enhancing the industrial competitiveness of Sinaloa. This deal ensures a stable energy source for Mexinol as it progresses into the execution phase. The agreement is poised to benefit the region with long-term advantages, showcasing the commitment towards sustained growth.

data.title: UCLA wins Deloitte FanTAXtic competition with 84 teams competing in real-world tax simulations.
data.description: Eighty-four teams of students took part in a national competition that involved practical tax strategy simulations aimed at training future tax leaders. The event took place in New York on February 16, 2026. One of the teams, from the University of California, Los Angeles, stood out...

data.title: New: Manic Panic launches futuristic Inter-Gel-Actic™ hair color collection, complete with DIY Box Set.
data.description: Manic Panic, a renowned hair color brand, has unveiled its groundbreaking collection "Inter-Gel-Actic™" in New York on February 16, 2026. This new line of highly-pigmented gel hair colors breaks new barriers in the realm of Semi-Permanent Hair Color. The collection introduces a revolutionary DIY Box Set for the first time, allowing users to easily apply the vibrant shades at home. Inter-Gel-Actic promises to venture into uncharted territories with its bold colors, appealing to adventurous individuals looking to experiment with their hair. Experience the future of hair coloring with Manic Panic's visionary Inter-Gel-Actic collection.

data.title: Acurx Pharmaceuticals to review financials on March 13, 2026, with ticker ACXP, focusing on new antibiotics.
data.description: Today, on February 16, 2026, Acurx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACXP), a leading biopharmaceutical company from Staten Island, revealed plans to engage in discussions regarding their innovative antibiotics for challenging bacterial infections. Acurx aims to introduce a novel class of antibiotics tailored for such infections as they progress through their late-stage development. The company is set to present further details regarding this development.
